payload.text: the rain in spain stays mainly in the plain

payload.name: tick
payload.description: Advance the book-world ecology one step. Organisms each predict the next character of the world.defined text. Read the latest tick.result for the current population and cursor (initialize ~24 random organisms if none exists). Advance the cursor one character; organisms whose guess matches the current character SPLIT a fixed reward pool (density-dependent: a char guessed by many pays little each, a rare-guessed char pays a lot); every organism pays a small tax; organisms with energy<=0 die; organisms above a birth threshold reproduce (a child with the parent's guess, mutated with small probability). Emit ONE tick.result snapshot of the new population.

payload.name: population
payload.description: Render the current ecology from the latest tick.result: step number, alive count, and a table of each guessed character showing how many organisms guess it beside that character's actual frequency in the world.defined text — so emergent convergence (population distribution tracking the book-world structure) is visible at a glance. Bare semantic HTML.
